name: Lead Re-Engagement (Cold Leads)
description: Re-engage leads who previously inquired but did not purchase
public_description: It's been a while — we wanted to check in and see if you're still thinking about getting out on the water.

questions.label: Are you still considering purchasing a boat in the next 6 months?
What's the main thing holding you back?
options: Nothing — I'm ready to move forward

questions.label: Has your boat preference changed since we last spoke?
options: Yes — looking at different type or size

questions.label: Would you like to see what's new in our inventory?
options: Yes, I'd like to come in

questions.label: How would you prefer we follow up?
